name: Kitchen Counter Decorative Coffee Bar Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Stylish and functional, this Decorative Coffee Bar Organizer from Brightroom™ is a practical addition to your kitchen. It features a wooden tabletop to place coffee and snack jars, and it also boasts a sliding drawer to keep paper napkins, cups, bowls and other accessories. Designed in a white hue, you can place it on your kitchen countertop for easy access.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
